feature: Rename shell completions command from generate-completion to completions
workflow_rationale: This is a simple task involving a single file change to rename an existing command variant. No multi-service coordination needed. The command functionality already exists and works correctly - we're just making it more user-friendly by shortening the command name from 'generate-completion' to 'completions'.

phases.name: Rename Command
phases.description: Rename GenerateCompletion command variant to Completions in main.rs

subtasks.description: Rename GenerateCompletion variant to Completions in Command enum
subtasks.notes: Changed line 151 'GenerateCompletion' to 'Completions' and line 496 in the match arm. Verified with cargo build --release.

verification.expected: Outputs bash completion script starting with _bop() function

subtasks.notes: Verified bash completions output successfully. Ran 'cargo run --release -- completions bash' and confirmed output starts with '_bop() {' function as expected. Valid bash completion script generated. No code changes needed - verification only.

verification.expected: Outputs zsh completion script with #compdef bop

subtasks.notes: Verified zsh completions output successfully. Ran 'cargo run --release -- completions zsh' and confirmed output starts with '#compdef bop' as expected. Valid zsh completion script generated. No code changes needed - verification only.

verification.expected: Outputs fish completion script with complete -c bop

subtasks.notes: Verified fish completions output successfully. Ran 'cargo run --release -- completions fish' and confirmed output contains 193 instances of 'complete -c bop' and proper fish completion script structure with helper functions like __fish_bop_global_optspecs. Valid fish completion script generated. No code changes needed - verification only.

subtasks.description: Run make check to verify all tests and lints pass

verification.expected: All tests pass, clippy and rustfmt checks succeed

subtasks.notes: Verified make check successfully. All 318 unit tests passed, all 31 integration tests (dispatcher_harness, job_control_harness, merge_gate_harness) passed, 1 doc test passed, clippy checks passed with no warnings, and rustfmt checks passed. Total 349 tests passed. The command rename from 'generate-completion' to 'completions' does not break any existing functionality.

acceptance_criteria: bop completions bash exits 0 and outputs a non-empty completion script
bop completions zsh exits 0 and outputs a non-empty completion script
bop completions fish exits 0 and outputs a non-empty completion script
verification_strategy.reasoning: Low risk change - renaming an existing working command. Only needs smoke tests to verify the renamed command still works correctly.

expected_behaviors: Each command outputs a non-empty completion script

acceptance_criteria_met: bop completions bash exits 0 and outputs 2,054 line completion script
bop completions zsh exits 0 and outputs 1,526 line completion script
bop completions fish exits 0 and outputs 221 line completion script
Clippy passes with no warnings (cargo clippy -- -D warnings)
